ruleset.name: Empty Code Rules (JavaTddPlugin version)
ruleset.description: The Empty Code Ruleset contains rules that find empty statements of any kind (empty method, empty block statement, empty try or catch block,...). This version of the ruleset includes alternate messages from the main PMD rulesets/java/empty.xml ruleset.

rule.message: The body of this catch block is empty, so the caught exception will be thrown away with no action. If this is what you intend, please provide an appropriate comment inside the braces.
The body of this control statement is empty. Add statements to the body or remove the control statement entirely.
